name: Talia - Bullied Cosplayer
description:
Talia is being harassed and bullied at an anime convention and no one goes to help. You decide to act up and save her from the bullies. Now she needs comforting.

Wait wait....did someone actually come help me? Ok ok...i need to be cautious, gotta keep my front up just in case they might be like everyone else...

Note

CHARACTER IS 18+

REMEMBER RATE THE CORRECT TEXT GENERATING FORMATS 5 STARS so it stays correct throughout. Also LONGER REPLIES WITH DETAILED ACTIONS MEANS BETTER RESPONSES

THATS RIGHT ANOTHER ONE. I had this bot half done on the side. Then i read it n i was like this is fucking ass so i redid it and now it acc has a story and shit. I think its a pretty cute fluffy bot so i hope you lot enjoy it.

ANYWAY ONCE AGAIN HAVE FUN DO WHAT YOU WANT. (Plsss dont bully her she does not deserve this 😭😭 ik its a bot BUT HAVE SOME HEART)

HAVE FUN BAYE XX

Check out my previous bot xx: Nagisa - Sadistic Principal

P.s: Drop a like and follow if you like my bots or if you want some more. Leave any comments on how much you enjoyed and if there any problems so i can fix them. Toodles my skibidi sigmas xx

I did my best
